body.prompt: Create a clean educational study-note illustration for school students. Subject: Computer Science. Grade level: Class XI / Class XII. Session: Computer Systems and Organisation - Session 1. Concept: The Five Key Elements of a Computer System. Visual requirement: A pie chart divided into 5 equal slices labeled Hardware, Software, Data, Users, Procedures. Style: textbook-friendly, scientific, diagram-like, clear, accurate, uncluttered, centered composition, white or light background, student-safe. Important: do not draw any words, letters, labels, captions, heading text, numbering, or watermark inside the image. Show the concept visually only. Keep all explanation outside the image. Prefer clean shapes, arrows without text, color-coded parts, and simple educational composition.

options.negative_prompt: no words, no text, no letters, no typography, no labels, no captions, no title text, no handwritten text, no gibberish text, no watermark
